global.description: The ad features a bold red background with prominent text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to book a deal for food.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'Hungry? We got you', set against the red background.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring a stylized icon, placed centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states '€29.99 night deals available', complementing the main message.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed to stand out against the red background.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you €2990 able Book now

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape or icon that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the logo is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
